title: Bhimashankar Wildlife Sanctuary
tagline: Bhimashankar Wildlife Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Maharashtra

overview.short: Bhimashankar Wildlife Sanctuary was created in the Ambegaon and Khed talukas of Pune District, in the Western Indian state of Maharashtra in order mainly to protect the habitat of
overview.description: Bhimashankar Wildlife Sanctuary was created in the Ambegaon and Khed talukas of Pune District, in the Western Indian state of Maharashtra in order mainly to protect the habitat of the Indian Giant Squirrel. It spreads through 3 districts of Maharashtra; Pune District, Raigad District and Thane District.

topPlaces.name: Ahupe
topPlaces.description: Ahupe is a village in Ambegaon taluka of Pune District in the state of Maharashtra, India. The village is administrated by a Sarpanch who is an elected representative of village as per constitution of India and Panchayati raj (India).

topPlaces.name: Gorakhgad
topPlaces.description: Gorakhgad Fort is a fort located 24 km from Murbad, Thane district, of Maharashtra. This fort is an important fort in Thane district.

topPlaces.name: Bhimashankar Temple
topPlaces.description: Bhimashankar Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva situated in its eponymous village, Bhimashankar, in Pune district of Maharashtra. It is a key pilgrimage centre and contains one of the 12 Jyotirlingas.

items.note: Ahupe is a village in Ambegaon taluka of Pune District in the state of Maharashtra, India. The village is administrated by a Sarpanch who is an elected representative of village as per constitution of India and Panchayati raj (India).
Gorakhgad Fort is a fort located 24 km from Murbad, Thane district, of Maharashtra. This fort is an important fort in Thane district.

Bhimashankar Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva situated in its eponymous village, Bhimashankar, in Pune district of Maharashtra. It is a key pilgrimage centre and contains one of the 12 Jyotirlingas.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Bhimashankar Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Bhimashankar Wildlife Sanctuary is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Bhimashankar Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Pune Airport (72 km) and the nearest railway station is Kalyan Junction (Mumbai) (46 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Bhimashankar Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Bhimashankar Wildlife Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Bhimashankar Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Bhimashankar Wildlife Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Bhimashankar Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Ahupe, Gorakhgad, Bhimashankar Temple.
